name: Fyber N.V.
summary: Fyber N.V. operating as a technology company in the field of in-app advertising in the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia Pacific, and internationally. The company's platform, Fyber FairBid, an independent monetization platform for app developers and mobile publishers. It also offers Fyber Marketplace, a programmatic ad exchange for the in-app environment; and Wall Edge, an opt-in, value-exchange ad format that is primarily used within gaming apps. The company was formerly known as RNTS Media N.V. and changed its name to Fyber N.V. in June 2017. Fyber N.V. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Fyber N.V. operates as a subsidiary of Advert Finance B.V.
